stanzas:
Kannil un kannil kadhal anjal
nenjil un nenjil kanavin oonjal
kaalam pooravum vazhanum needhaama..

Kayin un kayil vazhayal konja
Kaalil un kaalil kolusin kenjal
unnai un maaman konjanum nee vaama ...

Yedho aaghudhe,
en nenjukul edho aaghudhe unnaal thaane
Yellam marudhe
en vahkayil, ellaam maarudhe unnaae thaane

Idhuvrai illaadha mayakam ondru
idaiveli ilaamal miratudhu indru.. yen yen edhanaale ..

Idhuvarai sollaadha thayakam ondru
Mugavari sollaamal thavikkudhu indru
Unnaal unnaal unnaal thannaale ......(Kannil un kannil ...)

Yedho aaghudhe,
en nenjukul edho aaghudhe unnaal thaane

Mudhal murai nee paartha paarvai adhu
dhinam dhinam ennodu vazhkindradhu, anbe... oh anbe..
Mudhal mudhal nee sonna varthai adhu
uryirukkul eppodhum ketkindradhe ...
Idhuvarai kaanaadha kirakkam ondru
Thalai mudhal adivarai kolludhu indru ..
Inbam thunbam rendum unnaale .........(Yedho aaghudhe ..)

idaiveli ilaamal miratudhu indru.. yen yen edhanaale ..

Mugavari sollaamal thavikkudhu indru
Unnaal unnaal unnaal thannaale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yedho Aaghudae?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of Mambattiyan related to this song?

This song reflects the romantic moments in the movie, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Rita and composed by Thaman S.

When was Yedho Aaghudae released?

The song was released on December 4, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yedho Aaghudae, the listener is taken on a journey through the emotions of love and desire, as portrayed in the film Mambattiyan. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Rita's captivating vocals, combined with Thaman S's masterful composition, create a memorable listening experience. This track beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it resonate with anyone who has ever been in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yedho Aaghudae from Mambattiyan is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Rita's soulful voice and Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Thaman S's enchanting composition adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: In your eyes, love swings in my heart, and in your heart, dreams sway like a swing, both past and present.
In your hands, there is a way, and in your feet, there is a path; even your uncle would be amazed by you.
Something is happening in my heart, something is happening because of you; everything is changing in my life, it's all because of you.
Until now, there has been a dream without any interruption; today, it has become real because of whatever it is.
Until now, there has been a fear that hasn't been spoken; today, it is troubling me without any message from you, day after day.
Something is happening in my heart, something is happening because of you.
The first time I saw your gaze, it has been living with me day by day, my love... oh my love... The first words you spoke are always heard in my soul.
Until now, there has been a spark that hasn't been seen; today, it is taking over from the head to the feet. Both joy and sorrow are because of you.
Until now, there has been a dream without any interruption; today, it has become real because of whatever it is.
Until now, there has been a fear that hasn't been spoken; today, it is troubling me without any message from you.
In your eyes, love swings in my heart, and in your heart, dreams sway like a swing, both past and present.
In your hands, there is a way, and in your feet, there is a path; even your uncle would be amazed by you.
